ab: Samaanay ko romi’ad anini?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: Si^naway to miming, kapinanom to fa^detay a nanom.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: Samaanay ko romi’ad anini?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: Fa^edetay ko romi’ad to miming, kapinanom to nanom.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: Samaanay ko romi’ad i kaotal?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Ta’angayay ko cidal.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: Samaanay ko romi’ad i kaotal?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: tanoto’em sanay, awaay a masadak ko cidal i kakarayan.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: masamaan ko romi’ad ano cila?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: cowa kacidal, mato’em ta’angay aca ko fali ano cila.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: masamaan ko romi’ad toya romi’ad hakiya?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: si^naway to ko romi’ad anini, kaciriko’ to to kifetolay a riko’ ano mamasadak.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: masamaan ko romi’ad to pa’aliwacan?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: makapah ko romi’ad to pa’aliwacan.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: wa mama’orad toya romi’ad haw?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: makapah ko romi’ad toya romi’ad, cowa ko mama’orad.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: wa mama’orad toya romi’ad haw?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Hai, wa mama’orad toya romi’ad.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: ma’oraday no hatini haw?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: masaesa’ay to ko ’orad, masadakay to ko cidal!
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: ma’oraday no hatini haw?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: ma’oraday to! cowa kapihawikid kako to sa’ong.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: ma’oraday i kaotal haw?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: cowa ho ka’orad no hatini, wa mama’orad ano herek no lahok, kacisa’ong to ano mamasadak.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: wa si^naw ko romi’ad to kasi^nawan to roma a mihecaan hakiya?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: Hai, wa tadasi^naw ko romi’ad to kasi^nawan ano roma a mihecaan, saka pakapien to ko kaciriko’.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: fa^det ko romi’ad tona kaciherangan nona mihecaan hakiya?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: Hai, fa^det ko romi’ad to kaciherangan, saka saadihayen to ko pinanom to nanom.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: maolahay kiso to kacanglahan han?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: maolahay kako to kacanglahan, samanen haw i, dihekoay ko romi’ad to kacanglahan.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: maolahay kiso to laloodan han?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: cowa kaolah kako to laloodan, samanen haw i, adihayay ko faliyos to laloodan.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
